description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate cold wash Hang to dry in shade Iron with medium heat Do not bleach This turtle basic tee Sports a 'Turn Turtle' print on the chest as part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project, in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa. For the environmentally conscious, this T-shirt is the right way to go! Monochrome tees look great worn with anything – wear with classic or distressed denims, or you could even wear this with your gym shorts or track pants. Model statistics Product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
